Program_Description: WIC is a health and nutrition program for babies and children under 5, pregnant women, and new mothers.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children under 5
Eligibility_Requirements: Must be pregnant, breastfeeding, or have had a baby in the past 6 months; have children under 5 years of age; and have low to medium income or receive Medi-Cal, TANF, or CalFresh benefits.
Application_Process: Express interest using the online form or call for an appointment.
Required_Documentation: Proof of California residency is required.
